metadata.siteDescription: Novelis is Japan's leading platform for AI-generated novels with completion guarantee. Explore fantasy, romance, horror, mystery and more.

home.heroSubtitle: Where only the best stories rise to the top. Read or write — start here.
home.onboardingTitle: What kind of novels do you like?
home.onboardingSubtitle: Pick your favorite genres and we'll recommend stories for you
home.onboardingWelcomeLead: The place to find your next read.
home.onboardingWelcomeBody: A free novel platform with new stories every day. Tell us a little about your taste so we can recommend the right ones.
home.onboardingGenreHint: Pick 3 or more for better recommendations
home.onboardingReadyBody: We've personalized your home. Time to dive in.

episode.stayTuned: Stay tuned for the next update!
episode.tourStep1Body: Tap anywhere on the screen to show or hide the top and bottom menus.
episode.tourStep2Body: When you reach the end, the next episode loads automatically. No button needed.
episode.tourStep3Body: Tap the "Aa" icon at the top right to change the font size or background.

pages.novelsDescription: A curated collection of novels selected for quality. Explore fantasy, romance, horror, and many more genres.
pages.newEpisodesDescription: Recently published episodes. Stay up to date with the latest releases.
pages.rankingDescription: The most beloved novels ranked not just by views, but by completion rate, next-episode rate, and overall engagement.
pages.rankingSubtitle: Ranked by engagement score — factoring in completion rate and next-episode rate, not just views
pages.genreNovelsDescription: Browse {genre} novels. Find your next great read.
pages.noGenreNovels: No novels in this genre yet.
pages.noTagNovels: No novels with this tag yet.

notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

about.metaDescription: Novelis is a novel platform you can trust to find great stories. We deliver only novels selected for quality.
about.heading: About Novelis
about.missionBody: Novelis is a novel platform built to be a place you can trust to find great stories. No need to sift through mountains of content — only novels selected for quality make it here.
about.dataBody: We don't rank novels by views or follower counts. We measure what matters: did readers finish the story? Did they want to read more? Did they come back? Reader behavior data drives our quality assessment and continuous improvement.
about.feature1Body: Only novels meeting our quality standards are published. Quality over quantity, always.
about.feature2Body: Minimal UI distractions. Designed to keep you immersed in the story.
about.feature3Body: Fantasy, romance, horror, mystery, and more — a wide range of genres to explore.
about.feature4Body: All novels are free to read.
about.creatorTitle: We Don't Ask Who Made It — Only If It's Good
about.creatorBody1: AI-written, human-written, or a mix — we don't judge the tools. We only ask: did the reader enjoy it? Methods are free; results are what count.
about.creatorBody2: Current novels are produced using AI with human planning and editorial oversight. Quality is continuously improved based on reader behavior data.
about.contactBody: For feedback, requests, or bug reports, please reach out via our <link>contact page</link>.

contact.metaDescription: Contact Novelis. We welcome your feedback, requests, and bug reports.
contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: For feedback, feature requests, or bug reports about Novelis, you can reach us through the following channels.
contact.xBody: Feel free to DM or mention us.
contact.emailBody: For urgent or detailed inquiries, please use email.
contact.beforeContent: For content issues (inappropriate expressions, etc.), please include the novel title and episode number.
contact.beforePrivacy: For requests regarding personal data disclosure, correction, or deletion, please review our <link>Privacy Policy</link> first.
contact.responseTime: We typically respond within 3 business days.

privacy.metaDescription: Novelis Privacy Policy. Learn about how we handle your personal information.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: Novelis (hereinafter "this site") respects user privacy and strives to protect personal information. This Privacy Policy describes how we handle personal information on this site.
privacy.s2Intro: We may collect the following information:
privacy.s2a1: Access logs (IP address, browser information, access date/time)
privacy.s2a2: Browsing information via cookies and similar technologies
privacy.s2a3: Pages viewed, time spent, and other usage data
privacy.s2b1: Email address, name, etc. provided when contacting us
privacy.s2b2: Account registration information (if such features are provided in the future)
privacy.s3Intro: We use collected information for the following purposes:
privacy.s3a: Providing, operating, and improving our services
privacy.s3d: Preventing unauthorized use, ensuring security, and handling disputes
privacy.s3e: Notifying users about new features and services (with user consent)
privacy.s3f: Improving the quality of generative AI features, training and tuning generative models, and training and validating quality evaluation models and hit prediction models
privacy.s3g: Creating statistical data, analytical results, and trained models in a form that does not identify individuals, and developing new services
privacy.s4Body: This site uses cookies to improve user experience and for analytics purposes.
privacy.s4a: You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but some features may become unavailable.
privacy.s4b: We may use analytics tools such as Google Analytics. These tools use cookies to collect data but do not collect personally identifiable information.
privacy.s5Body: We do not disclose personal information to third parties except in the following cases:
privacy.s5a: When user consent has been obtained
privacy.s5c: When necessary to protect life, body, or property and obtaining consent is difficult
privacy.s6Body: We implement appropriate security measures to prevent leakage, loss, or alteration of collected information.
privacy.s7Body: We may use the following external services. Please refer to each provider's privacy policy for details.
privacy.s8Intro: Users have the following rights regarding their personal information held by this site:
privacy.s8a: Right to disclosure, correction, and deletion
privacy.s8b: Right to request suspension of use
privacy.s8Contact: Please contact us via our <link>contact page</link> to exercise these rights.
privacy.s9Body: We may modify this policy as needed. Updated policies take effect when published on this site.
privacy.s10Body: For inquiries about this policy, please contact us via our <link>contact page</link>.
privacy.s11Title: 11. Use of Information in Generative AI Features and Machine Learning
privacy.s11Intro: We handle information related to generative AI features and machine learning as follows for the provision and improvement of the Service.
privacy.s11a: Prompts, parameters, revision instructions, and outputs and editing histories that users input or generate via generative AI features ("User Input Data") may be used by us, royalty-free and without time limit, for purposes including training and tuning generative models, training quality evaluation models and hit prediction models, quality control, and developing new services.
privacy.s11b: Users shall not input confidential information, personal information, or information that infringes third-party rights into generative AI features.
privacy.s11c: Content submitted to the Service by Registered Users may also be used for purposes including operation and improvement of the Service, recommendation, training and validation of machine learning models, and statistical analysis.
privacy.s11d: We may process information obtained through the Service into a form that does not identify individuals and provide such processed data, analytical results, or trained models to third parties, or use them for the development of our new services.
privacy.s12Body: We retain personal information only to the extent necessary to achieve the purposes of use. Even after withdrawal, we may retain registration information, usage logs, submission history, access logs, communication records, IP addresses, device information, and similar data for a reasonable period as necessary for legal compliance, dispute response, prevention of fraudulent use, statistical analysis, training and validation of machine learning models, and similar purposes.

swipe.title: Swipe to Discover
swipe.subtitle: Swipe right → Interested / Swipe left → Skip

write.metaDescription: A writer-first platform. Keep 90% of all revenue. AI assistance is optional, never required.
write.heroTitle:
Tell Your Story,
In Your Own Words.
write.heroSubtitle: A clean, focused editor. Dashboards that show completion and retention rates. 90% revenue share. AI assistance is optional — use it only if you want to.
write.featureAIDesc: Write by hand in a focused editor. Call on AI for plotting or proofreading only when you want it. AI is a tool, not the default.
write.featureDataDesc: Free access to dashboards showing completion rates, drop-off points, and retention. See how readers engage with your story.
write.featureRevenueDesc: Industry-leading revenue share. 90% of all revenue — ads, subscriptions, everything — goes directly to you.
write.ctaSubtitle: Just pick a pen name — you can publish your stories immediately after signup.

writerApply.title: Register as a Writer
writerApply.subtitle: Set your pen name and start publishing immediately.
writerApply.penNameHint: Up to 50 characters. You can change it later.
writerApply.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
writerApply.benefit2: Access reader analytics — completion rates, drop-off points, and more
writerApply.benefit3: Keep 90% of all revenue your stories generate

dashboard.noNovelsHint: Create your first novel to start writing
